name: Cup-a, Cup-a, Cup-a, Four Confections
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the sugar and Karo syrup to a full rolling boil.
2. Remove from heat and add the crunchy peanut butter (and 1 teaspoon of vanilla, if desired).
3. Stir until well blended.
4. Add the Kellogg's Rice Flakes and toss until all ingredients are well coated.
5. Drop by spoonfuls onto waxed paper to cool completely.
6. Store in an airtight container.
